category_sources: source_facts.description says Miller is like sed, awk, cut, join and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV; official GitHub README describes it as a tool for CSV, TSV, JSON, JSON Lines, and tabular data.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and source_facts.name identify the project as Miller/miller.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo are the official GitHub repository; README contains getting-started and documentation links, making it the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/johnkerl/miller, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says Miller handles CSV, TSV, JSON, JSON Lines, and other data formats; source_facts.executables lists mlr.
